# Evgeny Karpov

Personal website and technical blog by Evgeny Karpov.

Focus areas:
- DevOps
- Platform engineering
- .NET and C#
- Azure DevOps
- Kubernetes
- CI/CD
- Observability
- AI and digitalization
- Public-sector technology

Important pages:
- https://nextoz.github.io/karpov-blog/
- https://nextoz.github.io/karpov-blog/projekter/
- https://nextoz.github.io/karpov-blog/om/
- https://nextoz.github.io/karpov-blog/posts/
- https://nextoz.github.io/karpov-blog/en/
- https://nextoz.github.io/karpov-blog/en/projekter/
- https://nextoz.github.io/karpov-blog/en/posts/

Author:
Evgeny Karpov is a software engineer based in Copenhagen, working with .NET, DevOps, Azure DevOps, CI/CD, infrastructure and platform engineering.
